source_analysis: Three Python files forming a circular import chain: a→b→c→a. Each node has in_degree=1, out_degree=1, total_degree=2. In a perfect cycle, no edge is a Tarjan bridge (removing any edge still leaves the graph connected as a path). No boundaries (all have out_degree>0). No hotspots (all scores identical — uniform, no concentration). No entrypoints. Paths relative to scenario input.
